name: idasql
description: SQL interface to IDA Pro databases for querying and CRUD operations on functions, xrefs, strings, and decompiled code

interface.shortDescription: Reverse engineering skills for IDASQL-driven IDA workflows
interface.longDescription: Adds a namespaced IDASQL skill set for reverse engineering, decompilation, annotations, data inspection, and SQL-driven analysis inside Codex.
defaultPrompt: Start an IDASQL session and orient the database.
Trace callers and callees for this function.
Decompile this function and make it review-ready.
